title: Colombia at the 2026 World Cup · lineup & formation | MyLineups
original_text:
Drawn into Group K, Colombia head into the 2026 World Cup in a 4-3-3, coached by Néstor Lorenzo.

It is a squad drawn from 24 clubs worldwide, averaging 30.5 years, and worth roughly 213.2 million combined. Plot the XI below, then open it in the free builder to shape your own Colombia lineup for the tournament.

Colombia line up for the FIFA World Cup 2026 in Group K in a 4-3-3 , with a back 4 and Vargas in goal.

In defence: Lucumí, Mojica, Sánchez, Arias, Ditta, and Mina.

In midfield: Lerma, Muñoz, Puerta, Rodríguez, Castaño, Machado, Portilla, Quintero, and Ríos.

In attack: Arias, Luis Diaz, Suárez, Campaz, Carrascal, Córdoba, Gómez, and Hernández.

The 26-man squad pulls players from 24 clubs across world football. The starting XI averages 30.5 years and is worth roughly 213.2 million combined.

Néstor Lorenzo (ARG) is the coach guiding this side.

Colombia stays tied to the World Cup hub and opens directly in the builder if you want to reshape the tournament XI — free on the web or in the mobile app.

Open Colombia in the free MyLineups builder, reshape the 4-3-3, pick your captain and export a clean image.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
